chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, ACJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. Nos.D-856 & 1811 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ C.P. No.D-856/2023. FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.24293/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.24294/2023. 3. For order on office objection. 4. For order on CMA No.3958/2023 (Exemption). 5. For order on CMA No.3959/2023 (Stay). 6. For hearing of main case. C.P. No.D-1811/2023. FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.24291/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.24292/2023. 3. For order on office objection No.! & 4. 4. For order on CMA No.9041/2023 (Exemption). 5. For order on CMA No.9042/2023 (Stay). 6. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 3rd November 2023 Mr. Muhammad Aslam, Advocate for Petitioners in both petitions. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, submits that petitioners do not want to press instant petitions and submits that petitioners will seek remedy available under the law, whereas, during pendency of instant petitions, they have been removed from service and have filed departmental appeals, which are pending. Accordingly, instant petitions stand dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. However, the petitioners may be at liberty to seek further remedy, as may be available to them, in accordance with law. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
